_comment: Template for paths.json (gitignored, local-only). Copy this file to paths.json and edit. Omitted keys fall through to env var then default. Keys: claude_home (overrides CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR), codex_home (overrides CODEX_HOME), cursor_projects (no env; CLI/config/default only), cursor_db (no env; CLI/config/default only), grok_home (overrides GROK_HOME). Paths containing sensitive absolute values must not be committed.
